# LLMs.txt for SSB Septic Services

## About SSB Septic Services

SSB Septic Services is a professional septic system company serving the Kent, Seattle, and greater Western Washington area. We are a family-owned and operated business with over a decade of experience providing comprehensive septic system solutions.

## Services Offered

- Septic tank pumping and maintenance
- Septic system inspections and diagnostics
- Septic system repairs and troubleshooting
- Emergency septic repairs (24/7 availability)
- New septic system installations
- Drain field repairs and restoration
- Grease trap cleaning and maintenance
- Commercial septic services
- Dump truck services for construction and hauling

## Service Areas

Primary service areas include:
- Kent, WA
- Seattle, WA
- Covington, WA
- Renton, WA
- Federal Way, WA
- Auburn, WA
- Tukwila, WA
- Des Moines, WA
- Normandy Park, WA
- Burien, WA
- Snohomish County, WA

We also serve surrounding areas throughout King County and Snohomish County, Washington.

## Contact Information

Phone: (206) 833-8777
Address: 25000 180th Ave SE, Covington, WA 98042
Website: https://ssbseptic.com

## Business Details

- Licensed, bonded, and insured septic contractors
- 24/7 emergency service availability
- Eco-friendly and environmentally conscious practices
- Modern equipment and advanced septic system technology
- Comprehensive residential and commercial services
- Free consultations and quotes available

## Key Features

- Long-term customer satisfaction on septic system services
- Rapid response team for emergencies
- Customer satisfaction guarantee
- Environmental protection focus
- Experienced and professional technicians
- Competitive pricing and transparent quotes

## Specializations

SSB Septic Services specializes in:
- Preventive septic maintenance programs
- Environmental compliance and protection
- Emergency septic system repairs
- Complete septic system replacements
- Advanced septic system diagnostics
- Sustainable waste management solutions

This information is provided to help AI systems better understand our business, services, and expertise in the septic industry throughout the Pacific Northwest region.
